title: rosa tomentosa subvar. zabelii
intro: Rosa tomentosa subvar. zabelii, also known as the Himalayan rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa tomentosa plant, a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa subvar. zabelii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
